title: thelocephala malleolata var. solitaria
intro: Thelocephala malleolata var. solitaria, also known as the solitary Thelocephala, is a type of lichenized fungus that belongs to the family Thelocarpaceae. The medicinal properties of Thelocephala malleolata var. solitaria lie in its high concentration of usnic acid, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. This plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety levels. Thelocephala malleolata var. solitaria can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
